title: CraftedElytras
description: Allows Elytras to be Crafted through defeating Withers
body: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5D4rOMPVXec" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Allows Elytras to be Crafted through defeating Withers and Phantoms. Phantom Membranes and a Nethere Star makeup the crafting recipe.No travel to the End needed to obtain an Elytra with this plugin. This plugin is great for SMP servers that want to add a little more value to defeating Withers than simply destruction tools and crafting beacons. This also allows the challenge of obtaining an elytra to be more entertaining than endlessly bridging out into the void in the End for hours searching for an end ship.
